zh.lifeSummary: 當Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda於大約1171年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安曼希利亞 德 拉斯 姆拉斯時，他的父親Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga2歲，母親Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez98歲。他和Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda于大约1171年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安曼希利亞 德 拉斯 姆拉斯时，他的父亲Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga2岁，母亲Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez98岁。他和Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Ramirez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Jorge, Raul, Roberto, Pedro, Ramon.
Spanish (Ramírez): patronymic from the personal name Ramiro . Compare De Ramirez .

variants.name: Remirez
meanings: Spanish (mainly Navarre; Remírez): variant of Ramírez (see Ramirez ).

variants.name: Rameriez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Ramírez (see Ramirez ).

variants.name: Rameriz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Alejandro, Felipe, Fermin, Lupe, Manuel, Margarita, Margarito, Miguel, Pedro.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Ramírez (see Ramirez ).

variants.name: Ramiro
meanings: Portuguese, Galician, and Spanish: from the personal name Ramiro, of Visigothic origin, presumably composed of the ancient Germanic elements rād ‘counsel’ + māri, mēri ‘fame, famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Señor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Andres, Blanca, Don Juan, Felipe, Valeria.
Spanish (Señor): nickname from the title señor‘mister’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mansilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Gustavo, Aura, Jose, Luis, Manuel, Mario, Osvaldo, Rafael, Rosendo, Aida, Avelina, Carlos.
Spanish: habitational name from Mansilla, a place in LaRioja province.

nameMeanings.name: Rueda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Fernando, Juan, Carlos, Francisco, Jaime, Jesus, Jorge, Miguel, Raul, Alfredo.

Spanish: habitational name from Rueda in Valladolid, Rueda de Jalón in Zamora, Rueda de la Sierra in Guadalajara, or any of the places called La Rueda, from Castilian rueda ‘wheel’, Latin rota. Compare Catalan Roda .

variants.name: Roda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Arturo, Francisco, Domingos, Manuel, Mario, Alfredo, Amandio, Andres, Angel, Eduardo, Elia, Gustavo, Joaquim.

Catalan: habitational name from any of various places called Roda, for example Roda de Ter, Roda de Berà, Roda de Ribagorça, from Catalan roda ‘wheel’ (from Latin rota), possibly denoting a waterwheel.
German: habitational name from any of numerous places, particularly in central eastern Germany, named Roda or Rhoda.

nameMeanings.name: Diego
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain; perhaps from Santiago or from a native Iberian name found in Latin as Didacus.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda was born about 1171, in Mansilla de las Mulas, León, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga, was 2 and his mother, Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez, was 98. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva. He died in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda est né environ 1171, à Mansilla de las Mulas, León, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez, avait 98 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva. Il est décédé à Espagne.

Er hatte mit Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda è nato il circa 1171 nel Mansilla de las Mulas, León, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga, aveva 2 anni e il suo madre, Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez, aveva 98 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva. Morì nel Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Ruedaが約1171年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンレoンマンシラ ド ラス ムラスで生まれた時，父Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorgaは2歳，母Sancha de Tovar Fernabdezは98歳であった。彼はCondesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silvaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼はスペインで死去した。

ko.Valderrábano, Palencia, Castilla y León,: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 파렌샤 발더a바노
ko.Mansilla de las Mulas, León, Castilla y: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 먼시라 데 라스 뮐라스
ko.lifeSummary: Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda(이)가 대략 1171년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 먼시라 데 라스 뮐라스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez(은)는 98세였다. 그는 Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 스페인에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diego Ramirez Froilaz, Señor de Mansilla y Rueda родился около 1171 г. в местности мансилла де лас мулас, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Conde Froila Ramírez, de Astorga было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Sancha de Tovar Fernabdez, 98. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Condesa De Cifuentes Aldonça Martins Da Silva. Он умер в местности Испания.
